hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely a thinking/planning process and never produces an actual clinical note. There is no final output to evaluate for hallucination, but the lack of any completed note means it cannot be scored favorably.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process with no completed clinical note. The instructions required returning ONLY the completed note, and instead the output is an endless loop of self-checks with no final product.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced, so no transcript content was captured in a final output.
missed_items: All transcript content — no note was generated

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured thinking/planning text.

entity_marking.rationale: No clinical note was produced, so no entity marking was applied in any final output.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive loops of the same self-check content repeated dozens of times.
